title: 10 best herbal tinctures for upper abdominal pain
description: Thyme tinctures helps with upper abdominal pain because of its potent antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The essential oils present in thyme, such as thymol and carvacrol, have been shown to effectively soothe digestive issues by reducing inflammation and alleviating cramping in the stomach and intestines. Additionally, thyme's antispasmodic effects help to relax the muscles of the abdominal wall, providing relief from discomfort and pain in this region....
